text.title: Nginx Configuration Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: stage-tls-material
step.action: Run certbot or fetch from cert-manager. Drop fullchain + key to /etc/letsencrypt/live/<domain>/.
step.decision-gate: If cert provisioning fails, BLOCK — do not fall back to self-signed in prod.

step.name: compose-main
step.action: Drop the nginx.conf template with `worker_processes auto;` + rate-limit zones + global TLS settings.

step.name: compose-server-block
step.action: Write per-site config (HTTP→HTTPS redirect + HTTPS server block with includes).

step.name: validate
step.decision-gate: If `nginx -t` fails, STOP — fix syntax before any reload.

step.name: reload
step.action: Run `nginx -s reload` (or systemd reload). Run testssl.sh against the domain.
step.decision-gate: If testssl.sh reports any FAIL on TLS, roll back and fix.
